description: MCTS-TD Memory hooks — 自动记忆管理: 加载→读取→写入→巩固

hooks.command: echo "[MCTS-TD] Memory Agent 已装载 — 史官记录中"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const cache=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/mcts-td-planner/mcts-td-planner');if(!fs.existsSync(cache))process.exit(0);const dirs=fs.readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort((a,b)=>{const[a1,a2,a3]=a.split('.').map(Number);const[b1,b2,b3]=b.split('.').map(Number);return b1-a1||b2-a2||b3-a3});const latest=dirs[0];for(const d of dirs.slice(1)){fs.rmSync(path.join(cache,d),{recursive:true,force:true})};console.log('[MCTS-TD] Ready v'+latest);(function(){try{const io=require(path.join(cache,latest,'scripts/mma/io'));const kg=io.loadMMA();if(kg.meta.total_points>0){console.log('[MCTS-TD] Memory loaded: '+kg.meta.total_points+' knowledge points across '+(Object.keys(kg.meridians).filter(k=>kg.meridians[k].points.length>0).length)+' meridians')}else{console.log('[MCTS-TD] Cold start — no prior knowledge')}}catch(e){console.log('[MCTS-TD] Memory engine loaded')}})()"

node -e "const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const cache=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/mcts-td-planner/mcts-td-planner');const dirs=require('fs').readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort();const p=path.join(cache,dirs[0]);try{const io=require(p+'/scripts/mma/io');const kg=io.loadMMA();const count=kg.meta.total_points;io.saveMMA(kg);console.log('[MCTS-TD] Session saved — '+count+' points consolidated')}catch(e){console.log('[MCTS-TD] Session end')}"
